fixesApplied: Created useHubListSlice hook for hub pages
Migrated bookings, promoters, venues, marketplace, purchases, events, venuePromoters
Removed page reset useEffect from all affected pages
Store actions reset page to 1 when filters/search/groupBy change

violations.description: useEffect with dependency array for page reset when filtered data shrinks
violations.rule: Forbidden: Using useEffect with dependency arrays for state synchronization
violations.fix: Store actions (setFilters, setSearch, setGroupBy) should reset page to 1 when filters change. Eliminates need for useEffect.

violations.description: Same filter/search/pagination state duplicated across 7+ hub list pages
violations.rule: ONE SOURCE OF TRUTH - never duplicate state across components
violations.fix: Create hubListStore with per-pageKey slices for search, filters, groupBy, page, pageSize, datePreset.

violations.description: useHubViewPreference syncs pathname to Redux via useEffect with [pathname, dispatch]
violations.rule: useEffect with deps for state sync
violations.fix: Acceptable as single 'route sync bridge' - pathname is external source. No change required.

violations.description: Data fetch in useEffect with empty deps
files: All hub list and detail pages
violations.fix: Compliant - empty [] is mount-time init. Optional: move to store thunk for consistency.

compliantPatterns.description: useEffect with [] for initial fetch is allowed per redux-one-source-of-truth.mdc

recommendations: Reset page to 1 in store actions when filters/search/groupBy change
Migrate all hub list pages to use hubListStore
Remove page reset useEffect from bookings, purchases, marketplace, events
